title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 57.102 - To report on jail and prisoners (second class counties)
text:
57.102.  To report on jail and prisoners (second class counties). — The sheriff in counties of the second class shall on January first of each year and every three months thereafter file with the circuit court of the county a report on the conditions of the county jail, the number of prisoners confined in said jail, together with recommendations relating to its operation.
(L. 1965 p. 150 § 8)
